emails.subject: Carson Llewellyn info
emails.body: Carson Llewellyn info Sara: Here's the updated info I promised re Carson: R. Carson Llewellyn 14027 Memorial Drive #301 Houston, TX 77079 Email: carson@carsonL.com Phone: 281-679-8822 Cell Phone: 281-435-3672 Fax: 281-679-8823

emails.subject: RE: Carson Llewellyn info
emails.body: RE: Carson Llewellyn info Thanks! My friend Donna called me yesterday and we were just talking about Carson. On a slightly different note, can I take you up on your offer to call Ofelia about not showing up on Thanksgiving Day? Sara To: Shackleton, Sara

emails.subject: RE: Carson Llewellyn info
emails.body: RE: Carson Llewellyn info Sara: I just called Ofelia and left her a voice mail message at home to please not come to your house on Thanksgiving. I'll also leave her a reminder note when she comes to my house next Wednesday. Take care, Mary
